Speech.Text: Commander,+ I have the guest I mentioned in my report.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Got here in no time.++ Especially considering you’re made of ore.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You wouldn't happen to be some lab-grown scout,+ sent to check things out beyond the Barrier, would you?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Though.++.++.++ given their precision,+ they wouldn't have sent you in such a mess.+ You're literally falling apart here.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So that’s how it is.++.++.++ ... I can’t hear your words,+ but.++.++.++ ... even you aren’t entirely sure yourself.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Anyway,+ even with your current form,+ it doesn't matter anymore.++ It's not for us,+ the dead folks,+  pass judgment by looks,+ heh.++.++.
Commander.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Berlich,+ Berlich,+ you understand it all yourself.++ We’ve discussed about this.++ He could be our only hope.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: After the tragedy that happened 10 years ago,+ we have nothing left to lose.

Speech.Name: Berlich
Speech.Text: Got it.++ My apologies for distracting you.++ Please,+ carry on.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Ahem,+ so.++ See this crystal on my table?++ We need to find more like it.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: If you head northwest a bit,+ almost to the very center of the island,+ as far as the crossroads,+ you should find them there.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: In exchange for the crystals you find,+ we will give you further information regarding this location.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Do we have a deal?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: And yet you accepted.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Thank you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Perhaps this was to be expected.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: What have you come for?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You know I won't give you the information for nothing.+ Though.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I can give you information who it is you are going to face.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Mostly,+ you'll face skeletons with shovels or even bare hands,+ however.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: One of them has a grenade.++ That bastard right there is the reason we won't go near that spot.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So be careful.++ I don’t think even you would make it out in one piece if it damages you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I wish you good luck.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Good luck.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So, you changed your mind?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You didn't even accept the offer,+ so why should I answer your questions?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Don't get me wrong,+ I'm ready to answer them,+ but only if you help us.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Believe me,+ we need this,+ as you do.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Think you can find information on your own?++ Think again.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Not many sentient left to talk to,+ and all the records have long since rotted away.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I’ll give you some time to chew on that.++ Choose wisely.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Oh.++.++.++ Just wonderful.++ Let's get to the point.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Since you already know the main plan,+ then in this case you should obviously be sure in your decision.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: And if you’re really going there.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: There will be a skeleton with a grenade at the end.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Stay safe.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: What?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Curious.++.++.++ Came up,+ stood there,+ walked off.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Believe me,+ there’s nothing here worth your while.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Good luck.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So, you still haven’t made up your mind.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Please,+ think it over.++ You've seen the state of most skeletons in this pit.++ We’re your only hope of making sense of any of this.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So go on.++ Make up your mind.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You already know what you need.++ I'll have more to say once the mission is complete.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So.++.++.++ what've you decided,+ golem?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: It's odd.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I know you got through those skeleton hordes just fine, so why are you so uncertain now?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You know.++.++.++ Sometimes life gives us tough choices,+ and we have to choose.++ Trying to avoid those choices only delays the inevitable.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Maybe you don't really get what's going on around here,+ and I get that.++ Not knowing what's next is terrifying.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Just think it over.++ You've got plenty of time to think in this place.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Even though you hesitated, I am grateful.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Thank you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I see.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You just want to see how I'll react if you keep doing that.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I used to know a guy like you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: He’d fidget around,+ start running around or talk nonsense —+ all just to see how others would react.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: He never made any sense to me.

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Well,+ I haven't made this option yet.++ So, look forward to the next ++++u++++p+++d+++a++t++e+s!!!))))

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Yeah, I promise,+ I’ll be releasing an update soon and adding this dialogue option.+ Honestly!))))

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Man,+ if I’d worked just a little harder,+ you’d have that option already.++ I’ll add it later)))).

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Maybe I'll get around to the code one day.+ But currently?+ I’m just lazy.)))))))

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Well, nothing here for now)))).+ But you can check out this file if you want.
